findings.recommended_action: Run lab-only validation before remediation. Do not apply production changes.

findings.recommended_action: Validate reachability and usage in the lab, then schedule remediation if confirmed.

cap: validation status likely_test_fixture limits score to 25
findings.description: Secret-like string appears in a test fixture.
findings.recommended_action: Keep as low priority, document fixture status, and ensure test secrets cannot be mistaken for real secrets.

policy_files.assist:
mode: assist
description: "Generate remediation plans and optional patch suggestions for human review."
allow_actions:
  scan: true
  enrich_context: true
  prioritize: true
  validate_in_lab: true
  recommend_fix: true
  generate_evidence: true
  create_patch_suggestion: true
  apply_patch: false
  mutate_cloud: false
  external_targeting: false
human_approval_required: true
policy_files.enforce_lab_only:
mode: enforce-lab-only
description: "Apply safe, reversible remediations inside local lab services only."
allow_actions:
  scan: true
  enrich_context: true
  prioritize: true
  validate_in_lab: true
  recommend_fix: true
  generate_evidence: true
  create_patch_suggestion: true
  apply_patch_in_lab: true
  mutate_cloud: false
  external_targeting: false
human_approval_required: true
scope:
  allowed_environment: local_lab_only
policy_files.learn:
mode: learn
description: "Generate findings, context, risk scores, and recommendations only."
allow_actions:
  scan: true
  enrich_context: true
  prioritize: true
  validate_in_lab: true
  recommend_fix: true
  generate_evidence: true
  apply_patch: false
  mutate_cloud: false
  external_targeting: false
human_approval_required: true
